title: BenchmarkPack
description: Top-level pack.yaml contents. Identity and versioning only. Runner behavior lives in config.yaml.

id.description: Stable pack identifier. Lowercase, hyphen-separated. Used as a key in results/experiments.jsonl.

schema_version.description: Pack contract version. Current = 1. Runners reject unknown versions.

description.description: One-line summary of what this pack evaluates.

version.description: Optional pack content version (semantic or date). Distinct from schema_version.

created.description: Optional ISO date the pack was frozen.

tags.description: Optional freeform tags for filtering or reporting.
